### PK model stability
From the latest dosing file, **nothing jumps out as acutely unstable**:
- all three patients have active schedules
- PK clearance values are present and patient-specific
- clinical notes are favorable for CU-001 and CU-002
- CU-003 is new, so it’s more of an early-monitoring case than a stability concern

That said, this file is a **dosing snapshot**, not a full model-health log, so I can say the **current dosing parameters look stable**, but I can’t fully confirm end-to-end PK model performance from this file alone.

If you want, I can also format this into a short report or email-ready note for Dr. Martinez.
